qualityFlags.message: No governed contaminant legal-limit coverage is currently curated for family `mercury_food_contaminants` in jurisdiction `eu`.
No jurisdiction-specific contaminant legal limit matched the requested lane for `eu`.

notes: No governed contaminant legal-limit records matched the requested filters.
Jurisdiction-specific contaminant legal-limit gaps are surfaced explicitly instead of borrowing values from another authority or matrix.

actionItems.title: Review occurrence context
actionItems.summary: Review monitored occurrence context, high-attention foods, and trend signals before interpreting this metals family.

actionItems.title: Review priority food groups
actionItems.summary: Confirm that the highest-priority food groups and high-attention foods remain explicit in the review package.

actionItems.title: Review sensitive populations
actionItems.summary: Confirm that sensitive-population context is reviewed explicitly before reviewer signoff is recorded.

actionItems.title: Review commodity-focus prompts
actionItems.summary: Work through the governed commodity- and population-focus prompts linked to this bundle.

actionItems.title: Review occurrence data ledger entry
actionItems.summary: Occurrence interpretation relies on governed monitoring-support context. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

actionItems.title: Review sensitive population context ledger entry
actionItems.summary: Sensitive-population focus remains prompt-based review context. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

actionItems.title: Review trend signal ledger entry
actionItems.summary: Trend signals remain qualitative review cues. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

actionItems.title: Review governance links
actionItems.summary: Confirm that source, method, legal, dataset, and reference-value links are sufficient for the intended review use.

notes: Signoff packet is a reviewer-facing overlay on top of the metals monitoring interpretation bundle and does not change the underlying bundle content.
Waived actions remain explicitly visible so downstream reviewers can inspect accepted deviations from the default review sequence.
Signed-off status records closure of the governed review workflow only; it does not certify scientific correctness, submission readiness, or regulatory approval.
Attached legal-limit review snapshots remain visible in signoff so family-level partial or missing jurisdiction support cannot be mistaken for a complete legal-limit layer.
At least one blocking metals monitoring action remains unresolved in the signoff packet.
